name: Chicken Benihana
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a griddle or frying pan with soybean oil until hot, coating the surface.
2. Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces and place on the hot griddle.
3. Season the chicken to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Cook the chicken until it is done.
5. Add a small amount of fresh lemon juice and sesame seeds.
6. Continue cooking for a few more minutes.
7. Serve with magic mustard sauce.
